name: The Acres - Restaurant + Bar + Driving Range + Mini Golf
about: The Acres is a 70-year-old iconic facility in the Village of Evendale, operating as a multi-venue complex that combines a golf simulator experience with a full-service restaurant, bar, and outdoor activities. The golf offerings include a 40-bay driving range, two 18-hole mini-golf courses, and a private Trackman simulation room. The establishment is designed for year-round entertainment, featuring a four-season patio with amenities like fire pits and cornhole. It serves American cuisine and a curated drink list, positioning itself as a comprehensive destination for dining, socializing, and golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Offers a premium Trackman simulator for precise shot analysis and simulation golf
Features 40 driving range bays, with 18 being covered and heated for all-weather use
Provides a private Trackman room with an 80-inch screen for up to 8 people
Combines golf practice with dining and a relaxed social atmosphere
Accessible year-round with a covered driving range and patio space

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-driven menu offering classic American food
Curated drink list including domestic and craft beers, assorted wines, and a cocktail menu

simulator_hardware.notes: Private simulation room with an 80-inch screen, full driving range access, and heaters for year-round use

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club rentals, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs for use on the driving range, in the Trackman simulator, or on the mini-golf courses.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The Acres offers a full-service restaurant and bar with a curated menu of American food, domestic and craft beers, wine, and cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes of simulation golf depends on group size and pace, but typically ranges from 60 to 90 minutes for a standard round.

faq.question: Is The Acres kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Acres is very family-friendly. It features two 18-hole mini-golf courses, a patio with cornhole and fire pits, and a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages.
